diags.description: Raw output from the underlying tool

error.description: Error message from the underlying tool

intervals.description: The breakdown of intervals of the test

streams.description: An array of information about each of the streams during this interval

end.description: The relative end time of this reporting interval, relative to the start of the test

lost.description: Summarized view of the overall lost packets

receiver-throughput-bits.description: Summarized view of the overall sender throughput rate in bits/second

retransmits.description: The number of retransmitted packets during this window

start.description: The relative start time of this reporting interval, relative to the start of the test

stream-id.description: The ID of the stream, most relevant when running parallel streams

tcp-window-size.description: The TCP window size at this point in time

throughput-bits.description: Summarized view of the overall sender throughput rate in bits/second

throughput-bytes.description: Summarized view of the overall sender throughput rate in bytes/second
